cashGap.understandingDesc: Variance is calculated as: (Closing Balance - Opening Balance) - Total Sales. Positive values indicate cash over, negative values indicate cash short. Regular small variances are normal, but large or frequent discrepancies may indicate training needs.

messages.formErrors: Please check the form for errors

confirm.changeCurrencyMessage: You are changing the system currency from {{from}} to {{to}}. This affects all future transactions and financial reports.

confirm.finalMessage: Are you absolutely sure? This is a critical system change that affects your financial data.
confirm.entryErrorMessage: Please enter a valid numeric tax rate to proceed with the update.
confirm.invalidTaxMessage: Tax rate must be between 0 and 100%

security.errorBanner: Please correct the highlighted errors below

cancel.title: Cancel Subscription
cancel.warning: Canceling locks access. Your data for "{{name}}" will be deleted in 30 days.

stopTrial.title: Stop Trial
stopTrial.warning: End trial for "{{name}}". Access will be revoked and services will stop.

deleteCard.title: Delete Payment Method
deleteCard.warning: Removing card ending in "{{name}}". This action is permanent. You won't be able to use this card for future payments unless re-added.

dissolveBrand.title: Delete Brand
dissolveBrand.warning: You are about to delete "{{name}}". All locations will return to independent mode.

deleteEmployee.title: Delete Team Member
deleteEmployee.warning: You are about to permanently remove "{{name}}" from the team. This will revoke all their access permissions immediately.

dissolveEstablishment.title: Dissolve Location
dissolveEstablishment.warning: You are about to dissolve "{{name}}". This will permanently cease operations and remove this location from your brand portfolio.

reactivate.title: Reactivate Subscription
reactivate.warning: This will charge your default card $20.00 to start a new billing cycle for "{{name}}".

warning.title: This cannot be undone
warning.subtitle: All data will be gone forever after 30 days.

confirm.gracePeriodDesc: You can stop this anytime in the next 30 days.
confirm.success: Deletion scheduled. Check your email for data exports.

banner.title: Deletion Scheduled
banner.desc: This location will be permanently deleted on {{date}}
